Headline: Financial - UK Private Schools, UK
Info: A report indicates that one in ten children have been withdrawn from UK private schools within a year of VAT being applied to fees, highlighting significant financial pressure on families.

Headline: Closure - UK Private Schools, UK
Info: Over 100 private schools across the UK have been forced to close, with the introduction of VAT on fees cited as the primary reason for these permanent closures.

Headline: Financial - Independent Special Schools, UK
Info: The government has announced measures to cap and control fees charged by independent special schools, addressing concerns over escalating costs in the sector.

Headline: Financial - Girls' Private Schools, UK
Info: Analysis reveals that girls' independent schools have been disproportionately affected by the introduction of VAT on fees, facing greater financial challenges and pupil withdrawals.

Headline: Closure - Devon State School, Devon
Info: A state primary school in Devon is facing permanent closure due to extremely low pupil numbers, currently having only two students enrolled.
